the candidate's answer surfaces only the save-and-apply path, which is the relevant one for the question ('guardar y aplicar la configuración') and matches the page's reminder to apply saved settings in the Main Menu — acceptable phrasing, not a correctness issue.","No existing gold or retriever-augmentation question covers Self-test; day/night and delay questions are semantically distinct."],"fact_verdicts":[{"fact_id":"F01","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"Page 91: 'De forma predeterminada, la autoprueba no está activada.'"},{"fact_id":"F02","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"Intro paragraph: autoprueba funcional para cada dispositivo de lazo e informe diario en dispositivos compatibles."},{"fact_id":"F03","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"Steps 1-2: Ajustes del panel → Otros ajustes → Self-test."},{"fact_id":"F04","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"Step 3: 'Seleccione y marque la casilla de verificación Habili.'"},{"fact_id":"F05","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"Step 4: TestH, hora de inicio, de 00:00 a 23:59."},{"fact_id":"F06","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"Step 5: ReportH, hora de generación del informe, de 00:00 a 23:59."},{"fact_id":"F07","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"Step 6: F4 (Enter) then F1 (Atrás)."},{"fact_id":"F08","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"Step 7 lists F1 (Guardar) and F3 (Aplicar) among options plus reminder to apply saved settings in Menú principal."}]},{"canary_id":"kidde_nc_internal_fault_startup","verdict":"PASS","question_fully_answerable":true,"question_duplicate":false,"topic_aligned":true,"gold_complete":true,"counterpart_materially_agrees":true,"material_disagreements":[],"unsupported_answer_claims":[],"blocking_issues":[],"nonblocking_notes":["The brand 'Kidde' in the question is not verifiable from the focus page pixels (retriever-augmentation questions for this same manual call it 'Serie NC de Notifier'); however, the counterpart independently used the same branding, the device family 'Serie NC' unambiguously identifies the manual, and all technical claims are brand-independent and fully pixel-supported — noted as a wording observation only.","The candidate omits the page's attribution of the special startup sequence to EN 54-2; this is contextual framing rather than a safety- or correctness-relevant omission.","Not a duplicate of ho006, which covers post-alarm reset and zone disable rather than the internal-fault startup sequence."],"fact_verdicts":[{"fact_id":"F01","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"Page 89 'Inicio de avería': secuencia de inicio especial tras detectar una avería interna."},{"fact_id":"F02","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"'El LED \"Avería\" general parpadea de forma rápida.'"},{"fact_id":"F03","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"'El LED \"Avería sistema\" parpadea de forma lenta.'"},{"fact_id":"F04","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"Steps 1-2: contraseña del nivel de usuario operador, luego botón 'Rearme'."},{"fact_id":"F05","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"'Si este estado de avería continúa después del rearme, la central cancelará la secuencia de inicio…'"},{"fact_id":"F06","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"'…y encenderá el LED \"Avería sistema\".'"},{"fact_id":"F07","supported":true,"page_correct":true,"answer_entails":true,"notes":"Último párrafo: comprobar todas las conexiones y la configuración de la central."}]}]}
